creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2007-07-08 12:41:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt/netams      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/netams/files netams.in 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/netams/files pkg-message.in 
  Removed files:
    net-mgmt/netams      pkg-message 
    net-mgmt/netams/files patch-src__common.c 
                          patch-src__ng_netams.c 
  Log:
  - Update to 3.4.0 RC 2
  - Use DISTVERSION to simplify things
  - Correct NO_PACKAGE message
  - Remove unused SYSDIR variable and dead code
  - Remove BROKEN on 6.x and above, it builds now
  - Use MAN8PREFIX for man8 pages
  - Refine pkg-message, and use SUB_FILES for it
  - Respect PREFIX in rc script, and refine the script a bit
  
  PR:             ports/113209
  Submitted by:   Dima Panov <fluffy at ael.ru>
  Approved by:    Yuriy N. Shkandybin <jura at netams.com> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.19      +9 -21     ports/net-mgmt/netams/Makefile
  1.15      +3 -3      ports/net-mgmt/netams/distinfo
  1.3       +9 -4      ports/net-mgmt/netams/files/netams.in
  1.2       +0 -29     ports/net-mgmt/netams/files/patch-src__common.c (dead)
  1.2       +0 -25     ports/net-mgmt/netams/files/patch-src__ng_netams.c (dead)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/net-mgmt/netams/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.4       +5 -6      ports/net-mgmt/netams/pkg-descr
  1.5       +0 -19     ports/net-mgmt/netams/pkg-message (dead)
  1.7       +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/netams/pkg-plist
